ingredients_text: Cake Dough 51% (Wheat Flour, Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Pasteurized Egg, Monopropylene Glycol, Emulsifiers (Mono and Diglycerides, Polyglycerol Esters of Fatty Acids), Humectants (Glycerol, Sorbitol), Raising Agents (Sodium Hydrogen Carbonate, Sodium Acid Pyrophosphate), Salt, Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Flavoring (Vanilla, Lemon), Citric Acid), Coating 26% (Sugar, Coating Fat, Cacao Powder 13%, Cacao Fat, Milk Powder, Sorbitan Tristearate, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin), Flavoring (Ethylvanillin)), Cacao Cream 20% (Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Cacao Powder 2%, Thickener (Pectin), Citric Acid, Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Flavoring (Chocolate), Caramel Dye), Decoration 3% (Sugar, Coating Fat, Whey Powder, Cacao Powder 5%, Emulsifier (Soy Lecithin)).

Peanut Caramel 37% [Maltose Syrup, Peanut 14%, Whole Milk Powder, Vegetable Oil (Palm, Cotton, Canola, Sunflower), Sugar, Invert Sugar Syrup, Salt, Emulsifier (Sunflower Lecithin, Mono and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids), Ammonium Bicarbonate, Flavorings, Colorant (Sulfite Ammonia Caramel)], Nougat with Peanut 42% [Sugar, Maltose Syrup, Vegetable Oil (Palm, Cotton, Canola, Sunflower), Peanut 9%, Invert Sugar Syrup, Egg White Powder, Whey Powder, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Powder, Salt], Milk Chocolate 21% [Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Whole Milk Powder 10%, Whey Powder, Vegetable Oil (Shea, Palm), Plain Butter, Emulsifier (Sunflower Lecithin, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate), Flavoring (Vanillin)].

Milk Chocolate (82%) (Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass, Skimmed Milk Powder, Emulsifiers (Sunflower Lecithin, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate), Flavoring (Vanillin) (Minimum 30% Cocoa Solids)), Hazelnuts (18%).
Paprika 84,95%, auberginen 8%, sonneblumenäl 3%, Zucker 29%, salz 1,5%, scharfe pfeiferoni 0,25%, branntweinessig 0,25%, knoblauch 0,05%.
